IAMSDatasetName

Provides access to properties and methods needed to manage dataset names in the tracking workspace.

Provides access to members of Terrain Data Element.

IDETerrainType

Provides access to the Terrain Data Element Type.

Provides access to members of Terrain Data Element.

IDataMessage

Provides access to methods and properties used to manage data messages.

IDatasetNames

Provides access to properties and methods needed to manage dataset name information.

IDynamicSurface

Provides access to members used to derive raster and TIN surfaces from a terrain.

Provides access to members that utilize Terrain surfaces.

Provides access to members that utilize Terrain surfaces.

Provides access to envelopes.

Provides access to members of LasPointEnumerator.

Provides access to properties and methods needed to manage temporal query filters.

ITemporalQueryFilter2

Provides access to properties and methods needed to manage temporal query filters.

ITemporalRecordSet

Provides access to methods needed to set up and fill a temporally sorted record set.

ITemporalTable

Provides access to properties and methods in which a temporal table can be controlled.

ITemporalWorkspaceStatistics

Provides access to properties and methods needed to manage message rate statistics in workspace.

ITerrain

Provides access to members used to acquire information about a Terrain and to retrieve DynamicSurface objects from which raster and TIN surfaces are made.

ITerrain2

Provides access to members used to acquire information about a Terrain and to retrieve DynamicSurface objects from which raster and TIN surfaces are made.

ITerrainAsciiDataImporter

Provides access to members that handle importing terrain source data in ASCII format.

ITerrainAsciiDataImporter2

Provides access to members that handle importing terrain source data in ASCII format.

Provides access to members that provide information about an attribute blob.

ITerrainBlobWriter

Provides access to members that construct an attribute blob.

ITerrainDataImporter

Provides access to members that handle importing terrain source data.

Provides access to members of Terrain Data Source.

Provides access to members used to modify and build a terrain.

Provides access to members used to modify and build a terrain.
